title: Ministry Of Humour Mug Not Nasty Just Honest Novelty Fun Gift
features: This oversized 400 ml mug was created for one reason only, and it was to make you laugh. The ministry of humour mugs are here to present their best jokes to make your life easier when choosing a gift for that one special person in your life who has a great sense of humour
This design features not nasty just honest written in red font, upon a white background and it is double sided, meaning there is the same written message on the other side
Made of ceramic, not bone china
description: Give the straight talking person in your life the perfect cuppa companion with this Not Nasty - Just Honest ceramic mug. From the Ministry of Humour by HARVEY MAKIN - putting the tongue into giftware's cheek Like its bold red title - this white ceramic mug is a no nonsense gift for a no nonsense guy or girl. Suitable for dishwasher and microwave. The Ministry of Humour has one objective- to help bring a smile to the grumpy old git's face. Tongue in cheek slogans and bold but blokey colours on a collection of mugs, socks, stationery and glassware provide the perfect collection of novelty giftware for the man who doesn't take himself too seriously. The HARVEY MAKIN brand offers a broad collection of high quality gentlemen�s giftware that is classic, modern and stylish. The brand fuses well chosen materials with trend led designs and licenses to offer an unrivalled assortment of novelties, accessories & collectables for the discerning father or friend.
